data.body: FIXED + live-validated. Root cause was TWO layers: (1) the agentic verifier's request_limit=ceil(50/2)=25 model requests was too low (92fa needs 33); (2) the runner read self._config.max_iterations, IGNORING the per-request req.config that RunnerAgentStep scaled — so scaling never reached it (a false-green: my unit test asserted req.config, the runner reads self._config). Fix: runner.effective_max_iterations honors max(self._config, req.config) per call; RunnerAgentStep scales via with:step_budget_per_item=25/finding (carried in with: since the v3 step schema is closed); verify-failure recovery preserves Pass-1 findings (verify_failed != llm_unavailable) and fails-open unless a finding is on a blocking criterion; observability adds usage.requests -> coverage.metrics.verify_requests. LIVE: 8e6f->BLOCK, 92fa->PASS(33 req), 9df3->PASS(23 req), all verify_error=None, no INDETERMINATE. Unit: 2465 passed; make lint clean (pinned ruff).
